themeWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
A gift or tribute; a grain or general offering presented to God.

sentenceTheme: God affirms His love for Israel and rebukes the priests for despising His name through polluted sacrifices and irreverent worship.

verses.text: The burden of the word of the LORD to Israel by Malachi.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
Israel; the name of Jacob and the nation descended from him.

verses.text: I have loved you, saith the LORD. Yet ye say, Wherein hast thou loved us? Was not Esau Jacob's brother? saith the LORD: yet I loved Jacob,

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
Jacob; the patriarch, later named Israel.

verses.text: And I hated Esau, and laid his mountains and his heritage waste for the dragons of the wilderness.

highlightedWords.meaning: Esau; brother of Jacob and ancestor of Edom.
Wilderness, desert, or uninhabited land.

verses.text: Whereas Edom saith, We are impoverished, but we will return and build the desolate places; thus saith the LORD of hosts, They shall build, but I will throw down; and they shall call them, The border of wickedness, and, The people against whom the LORD hath indignation for ever.

highlightedWords.meaning: Edom; the nation descended from Esau.
The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.

verses.text: And your eyes shall see, and ye shall say, The LORD will be magnified from the border of Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
Israel; the name of Jacob and the nation descended from him.

verses.text: A son honoureth his father, and a servant his master: if then I be a father, where is mine honour? and if I be a master, where is my fear? saith the LORD of hosts unto you, O priests, that despise my name. And ye say, Wherein have we despised thy name?

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
A priest; one who officiates in sacred service.

verses.text: Ye offer polluted bread upon mine altar; and ye say, Wherein have we polluted thee? In that ye say, The table of the LORD is contemptible.

highlightedWords.meaning: An altar; a place of sacrifice.
The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.

verses.text: And if ye offer the blind for sacrifice, is it not evil? and if ye offer the lame and sick, is it not evil? offer it now unto thy governor; will he be pleased with thee, or accept thy person? saith the LORD of hosts.

highlightedWords.meaning: A governor or provincial official.
The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.

verses.text: And now, I pray you, beseech God that he will be gracious unto us: this hath been by your means: will he regard your persons? saith the LORD of hosts.

highlightedWords.meaning: To say, speak, or declare.
The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.

verses.text: Who is there even among you that would shut the doors for nought? neither do ye kindle fire on mine altar for nought. I have no pleasure in you, saith the LORD of hosts, neither will I accept an offering at your hand.

highlightedWords.meaning: An altar; a place of sacrifice.
A gift or tribute; a grain or general offering presented to God.

verses.text: For from the rising of the sun even unto the going down of the same my name shall be great among the Gentiles; and in every place incense shall be offered unto my name, and a pure offering: for my name shall be great among the heathen, saith the LORD of hosts.

highlightedWords.meaning: A nation or people; often used of the non-Israelite nations.
A gift or tribute; a grain or general offering presented to God.

verses.text: But ye have profaned it, in that ye say, The table of the LORD is polluted; and the fruit thereof, even his meat, is contemptible.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
To defile, pollute, or make ceremonially unclean.

verses.text: Ye said also, Behold, what a weariness is it! and ye have snuffed at it, saith the LORD of hosts; and ye brought that which was torn, and the lame, and the sick; thus ye brought an offering: should I accept this of your hand? saith the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: A gift or tribute; a grain or general offering presented to God.
The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.

verses.text: But cursed be the deceiver, which hath in his flock a male, and voweth, and sacrificeth unto the LORD a corrupt thing: for I am a great King, saith the LORD of hosts, and my name is dreadful among the heathen.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD.
A king or ruler; one who reigns.
